title: Automating linked dependency items
excerpt:
I know how to mark that Item B is dependent on Item A. Is it possible to automate the creation of an update so that, when the dependency is created, Item A gets an update which lists what task is dependent on it? 
The RA…

posts.author: ACM (Alice Macklin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know how to mark that Item B is dependent on Item A. Is it possible to automate the creation of an update so that, when the dependency is created, Item A gets an update which lists what task is dependent on it?

The RACI for Item A should be able to see that their work has a direct impact on Item B. I could go in and do it manually but it’d be great to automate it!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alice,

This is a great suggestion that I am afraid isn’t currently supported

That said, so that I am across what you’re looking to achieve, you’d ideally like for an update to populate with information pertaining to the item it’s dependent on?

posts.author: ACM (Alice Macklin)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like an automation to create an update populated with information pertaining to the item that is dependent on it, so those working on it can see what their work is affecting further down the line.
